changelog:
--- BIG UPDATE: Polie v0.4.0 ---
- Modular Architecture (Complete Refactoring): Code is now professionally split into independent modules.
- Multi-repository Support: Automatically scans and reads any `.json` file placed in the `./pkglist/` folder.
- Strict Cross-Platform Support: Uses native `os.name` to block installations of incompatible OS packages.
- Static Typing (Type Hinting): Added type declarations to improve readability and prevent development bugs.
- Clean System Folder Management: Automatically creates and isolates `./pkglist/` and `./pkg/` directories.
- Expanded Archive Decompression Support: Code prepared to extend compatibility to `.zip`, `.tar`, and `.7z` formats.
- System Permission Handling: Gracefully catches `PermissionError` if launched without admin/sudo privileges.
- Enhanced security & Fewer bugs.
- Reinstall the program if it is broken using `upgrade.py -f "URL"`.
- Logging system for downloads.
